description: Goal: compiler2 has exactly one recursive quoted-source expansion engine for source sugar rewrite, macro resolution, require gating, MacroExecutable waits, __CALLER__ projection, interpreter invocation, recursive re-expansion, and macro telemetry. Signal: the duplicated expansion walkers disappear from source_publish and jobs/source; item-level expansion and ExpandFunctionSource both call the same subsystem; new expansion rules land in one place instead of two. Strategy: carve the common engine out of the current scope-tier and function-demand walkers, give it the minimal policy surface it needs to distinguish scope-fragment and function-body entry modes, and delete the mirrored traversal code once both call sites are moved over.
title: Compiler2 quoted expander: extract the shared quoted-source expansion engine and delete duplicate walkers
